title: Multi-scale FWI Practice Note
summary: Multi-scale FWI reduces cycle-skipping risk by introducing lower-frequency information before higher-frequency updates.
assumptions: the starting velocity model is close enough for early arrivals
the first usable frequency band is identified before inversion

parameter_advice.frequency_band: Start from the lowest reliable band and only add higher frequencies after the low-frequency stage stabilizes.
parameter_advice.initial_model: Prefer a smoothed background model before high-frequency FWI.
